actions.value:
Here the steps to recover your funds:

  1. Locate the right BNB wallet in you Edge app: open the BNB wallet, tap on Request and check if the address is bnb186fpg2u9ugwff50qcgw5wjvgadqfaeugernt7y
  2. Export your Master Private Key by going to the main screen (Wallets list). Now press and hold on the BNB wallet's name or slide from right to left and click on Master Private Key. Enter your password and manually copy the seeds.
  3. Download Trust Wallet
  4. Open Trust Wallet, tap on I already have a wallet, select BNB Beacon Chain.
  5. Enter a name and enter the seeds you copied before
  6. You should be able to see the funds. If you don't see your tokens, go to the Wallet page, scroll down, tap Add Tokens and search for
